prompt:
Ultra-realistic streetwear collab magazine cover featuring a stylish Korean woman in a New Balance colour-coded look — a sport-prep bomber jacket and matching straight-leg joggers in the shoe's colourway — holding a New Balance 1906R up in one hand at shoulder height with a proud collector's grip. Sleek straight hair with micro-fringe, bold editorial makeup, metallic liner. Background: clean stark white studio with a single large New Balance graphic wall installation, product shadow casting graphically on the floor. "HIGHSNOBIETY" masthead in editorial black bold with collab logo callout. 50mm lens, ultra-detailed ABZORB midsole and mesh upper detail, 8K photorealistic. 

Negative: cartoon, blurry, incorrect shoe, watermark, distorted.
promptEn:
Ultra-realistic streetwear collab magazine cover featuring a stylish Korean woman in a New Balance colour-coded look — a sport-prep bomber jacket and matching straight-leg joggers in the shoe's colourway — holding a New Balance 1906R up in one hand at shoulder height with a proud collector's grip. Sleek straight hair with micro-fringe, bold editorial makeup, metallic liner. Background: clean stark white studio with a single large New Balance graphic wall installation, product shadow casting graphically on the floor. "HIGHSNOBIETY" masthead in editorial black bold with collab logo callout. 50mm lens, ultra-detailed ABZORB midsole and mesh upper detail, 8K photorealistic. 

Negative: cartoon, blurry, incorrect shoe, watermark, distorted.
promptZh:
超写实街头潮流联名杂志封面，主角为一位身着 New Balance 配色造型的 韩国女性 —— 穿着与鞋款配色呼应的运动风棒球夹克和配套直筒慢跑裤，单手在肩部高度以收藏家自豪的姿态展示着一双 New Balance 1906R。利落的直发搭配微刘海，大胆的编辑风格妆容，金属感眼线。背景：简洁纯净的白色影棚，墙面设有大型 New Balance 图形装置，产品阴影在地面投射出几何美感。“HIGHSNOBIETY” 刊头采用编辑风格的黑色粗体字，并标注联名 Logo。50mm 镜头，超细节的 ABZORB 中底和网面材质细节，8K 照片级画质。

负面提示词：卡通、模糊、鞋子错误、水印、畸变。
